name: ansible-doc
description: Displays information on modules installed in Ansible libraries

name: --metadata-dump
options.description: For internal testing only Dump json metadata for all plugins

name: --playbook-dir
options.description: Sets the relative path for many features including roles/ group_vars/ etc

name: --version
options.description: Shows version number, config file location, module search path, module location, executable location and exit

name: --list_files
-F
options.description: Show plugin names and their source files without summaries (implies --list)

name: --module-path
-M
options.description: Prepend colon-separated path(s) to module library

name: --entry-point
-E
options.description: Select the entry point for role(s)

name: --list
-l
options.description: List available plugins; a supplied argument will be used for filtering (can be a namespace or full collection name)

name: --roles-path
-r
options.description: The path to the directory containing your roles

name: --snippet
-s
options.description: Show playbook snippet for these plugin types: inventory, lookup, module

name: --verbose
options.description: Verbose mode (-vvv for more, -vvvv to enable connection debugging)

name: -v
options.description: Verbose mode (-vvv for more, -vvvv to enable connection debugging)
